home.hero_subtitle: Paste a mobile.de listing link and get an instant ISV estimate. Know the total cost before you buy.
home.step1_title: Tell us what you're looking for
home.step1_desc: Already have a car in mind or need help? We help you find the best options for your budget and lifestyle.
home.step2_desc: We send multiple turnkey proposals, no commitment. Ask for as many as you want until you find the ideal vehicle.
home.step3_desc: Once the proposal is approved, we initiate the import. We handle documentation, contracts and purchase from the dealer.
home.step4_desc: We arrange transport with insurance for the vehicle's value. We guarantee safe delivery to our logistics centre in Portugal.
home.step5_desc: Once the vehicle arrives in Portugal, we initiate the legalisation process — including inspection, DAV, ISV payment and approvals with AT, Customs and IMT.
home.step6_desc: When the national licence plate is issued, we prepare vehicle delivery and proceed with the initial registration for DUA issuance in your name.
home.feature_sim_desc: Estimate the Vehicle Tax for any car on mobile.de — petrol, diesel, hybrid or electric.
home.feature_prop_desc: Receive a personalised quote including ISV, customs clearance, transport and registration.
home.disclaimer: ISV values shown are estimates based on CISV 2025 tables. The final value is determined by the Portuguese Tax Authority (AT) after official inspection.
